backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICDex grid trading bot; manages bot state, order placement/cancellation via ICDex canister, activity logging, and exposes query/update methods for config, status, grid data, open orders, and trade history.
backend/migration.mo: Defines OldActor and NewActor state shapes and a run() migration function that passes state through unchanged, supporting canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for grid preview, open orders, trade history, and useQueries audit fixes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, responsive grid of trading panels, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: Activity log panel that fetches and displays timestamped log entries with event-type color coding, plus loading skeletons, error state, and empty state handling.
Renders a bot control panel with start/stop buttons, live status indicator, and config summary (spread, orders, interval) using React Query hooks for bot state management.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: Displays a configuration form for bot parameters (spread, grid orders, refresh interval) with validation, loading skeletons, and a save action that currently simulates persistence with a note about redeployment.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Shows a scrollable table of grid price levels split into buy/sell sides with a computed mid-price, loading skeletons, error state, and a manual refresh button.
Displays live market data (mid price, best bid/ask, order book depth) with a dynamic status badge (LIVE/IDLE/STALE/ERROR) and a relative-time staleness indicator updated every second.
Lists open bot orders sorted by side and price with formatted price/quantity/timestamp columns, a cancel-all button with pending/success states, and loading skeletons on initial fetch.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: React component that displays a scrollable, reverse-chronological trade history table with buy/sell side, price, quantity, status, and relative timestamp columns, polling data via the useTradeHistory hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including bot status, config, trade history, open orders, activity log, and mutations for starting/stopping the bot and cancelling orders, with polling intervals and canister health checks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports JetBrains Mono, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines a terminal-themed dark color palette using OKLCH CSS variables along with custom scrollbar and utility component styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens (terminal buy/sell/neutral), custom box shadows, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the ICDex Trading Bot project state at version 3, documenting known issues with empty Grid Levels, Open Orders, and Trade History dashboard sections, along with four existing fix features and one pending action request to resolve the empty/no-data problem.
